ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tax_sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax section */,
  "subsection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subsection (if any) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the tax section */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the section was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the section was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_sections_subsection_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsection_id") REFERENCES tax_subsections ("subsection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_subsections" (
  "subsection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax subsection */,
  "subsection_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax subsection */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the tax subsection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subsection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subsection was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subsection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax section */,
  "subsection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax subsection (if any) */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., sale of scrap, tendu leaves) */,
  "threshold_limit" REAL /* Threshold limit for the tax rate */,
  "rate" REAL /* Tax rate */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the tax rate becomes effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the tax rate expires */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the tax rate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tax rate was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the tax rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_subsection_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsection_id") REFERENCES tax_subsections ("subsection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_payment_type FOREIGN KEY ("payment_type") REFERENCES payment_types ("payment_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES tax_sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_types" (
  "payment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment type */,
  "payment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the payment type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxpayer_info" (
  "taxpayer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxpayer */,
  "taxpayer_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxpayer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the taxpayer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the taxpayer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the taxpayer */,
  "taxpayer_type" TEXT /* Type of taxpayer (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the taxpayer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the taxpayer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxpayer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax payment */,
  "taxpayer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxpayer who made the payment */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax section */,
  "subsection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax subsection (if any) */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_payments_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES tax_sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_payments_subsection_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsection_id") REFERENCES tax_subsections ("subsection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_payments_taxpayer_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxpayer_id") REFERENCES taxpayer_info ("taxpayer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_payments_payment_type FOREIGN KEY ("payment_type") REFERENCES payment_types ("payment_type_name")
)
